Test Description: Open the app for the first time. You should be presented with either a guest name screen or an auth screen.
Expected Result: A guest username creation screen or an auth screen appears; you are not logged in.

Test Description: Tap 'Create an Account' on the guest screen. Verify the auth screen opens with the Sign Up form active.
Expected Result: The auth screen displays with 'Sign Up' toggle active and fields for Full Name, Email, and Password.

Test Description: Toggle between 'Sign Up' and 'Log In' pills. Verify the form switches correctly (display name field shown/hidden).
Expected Result: Tapping 'Log In' hides the Full Name field; tapping 'Sign Up' shows it.

Test Description: Submit the Sign Up form with an invalid email (e.g. 'notanemail'). Verify an error message appears.
Expected Result: A red error banner appears: 'Please enter a valid email address (e.g., name@example.com).'

Test Description: Submit the Sign Up form with a password shorter than 6 characters. Verify validation.
Expected Result: Error: 'Password must be at least 6 characters long for security.'

Test Description: Submit the Sign Up form with an empty display name. Verify validation.
Expected Result: Error: 'Please enter your full name to continue.'

Test Description: Sign up with valid credentials (email + password >= 6 chars + display name). Verify navigation to email verification.
Expected Result: After successful sign-up, you are taken to the Email Verification screen showing the registered email.

Test Description: On the Email Verification screen, tap 'I've Verified - Continue' WITHOUT actually verifying the email. Verify error.
Expected Result: Error message: 'Email not verified yet. Please check your inbox and click the verification link.'

Test Description: Actually verify your email (open inbox, click link), then return to the app and tap 'I've Verified - Continue'. Verify navigation.
Expected Result: The app detects verification and navigates to the main app (Home screen via MainNavigation).

Test Description: Verify the auto-polling mechanism: after verifying your email, wait 5 seconds. The screen should auto-advance.
Expected Result: Within a few seconds, the app auto-detects verification and navigates to the main app.

Test Description: Tap 'Resend Email' on the verification screen. Verify cooldown countdown.
Expected Result: Button changes to 'Resend in 30s' and counts down; tapping it is disabled during cooldown.

Test Description: Tap 'Use a different email' on the verification screen. Verify you are logged out.
Expected Result: You are logged out and returned to the auth screen.

Test Description: Log in with previously created credentials. Verify successful login navigates to main app.
Expected Result: After login, you are taken to the Home screen with your data loaded.

Test Description: Attempt to log in with wrong password. Verify error message.
Expected Result: Error: 'Incorrect password. Please try again or reset your password.' or 'Invalid email or password.'

Test Description: Attempt to log in with unregistered email. Verify error message.
Expected Result: Error: 'No account found with this email address.'

Test Description: Tap 'Continue as Guest' on the guest name screen. Enter a username of 3+ chars and submit.
Expected Result: A guest profile is saved locally; you are taken to the main app as a guest user.

Test Description: On the guest name screen, enter a username shorter than 3 characters and submit.
Expected Result: Validation error: 'Username must be at least 3 characters'

Test Description: On the guest name screen, submit with an empty username.
Expected Result: Validation error: 'Please enter a username'

Test Description: As a logged-in user, view the Home screen. Verify your display name, total score, level, streak, and stats are shown.
Expected Result: Player header shows your name, XP progress bar, level name, streak count, and score. Stats panel shows questions answered, accuracy %, streak, and score.

Test Description: As a guest user, view the Home screen. Verify the display shows 'Guest' or your guest username with zero stats.
Expected Result: Home screen shows guest name with 0 questions answered, 0% accuracy, 0 streak, 0 points.

Test Description: Verify the animated entry: widgets should fade and slide in from below with staggered timing.
Expected Result: Each home section (header, leaderboard, XP vault, quests) appears with a smooth staggered slide-up animation.

Test Description: Tap on the streak counter. Verify the Streak Card modal opens.
Expected Result: A modal appears showing streak information and animations.

Test Description: Tap on the level badge/name. Verify the Levels Overview modal opens.
Expected Result: A modal appears showing level progression details.

Test Description: Verify the Leaderboard Carousel is displayed on the home screen.
Expected Result: A carousel of top-ranked users is visible with animated cards.

Test Description: Verify the XP Vault card is shown and displays your total score.
Expected Result: Card shows your XP total; tapping it navigates to the Rankings page.

Test Description: Verify all 3 Quest cards are displayed: Computer Architecture, Software Engineering, Computer Networking.
Expected Result: Three distinct quiz category cards are visible with icons and descriptions.

Test Description: Tap the 'Computer Architecture' quest card. Verify navigation to the Challenge Select screen.
Expected Result: You are taken to the Challenge Select screen for Computer Architecture.

Test Description: Tap the 'Software Engineering' quest card. Verify navigation.
Expected Result: You are taken to Challenge Select for Software Engineering.

Test Description: Tap the 'Computer Networking' quest card. Verify navigation.
Expected Result: You are taken to Challenge Select for Computer Networking.

Test Description: On the Challenge Select screen, verify the category name matches the quest you tapped.
Expected Result: Screen title and header show the correct category name.

Test Description: Verify the header shows the category icon, name, and instructional text.
Expected Result: Large icon, category name, and 'Select Challenge Mode' subtitle are displayed.

Test Description: Tap 'Normal Challenge'. Verify you are taken to Quiz Play in normal (untimed) mode.
Expected Result: QuizPlayScreen opens with no timer visible; you can answer questions at your own pace.

Test Description: Tap 'Timed Challenge'. Verify you are taken to Quiz Play with a 15-second timer per question.
Expected Result: QuizPlayScreen opens with a circular timer counting down from 15 seconds per question.

Test Description: If you are logged in, verify the 'Download 50 Questions for Offline Use' button is shown.
Expected Result: A download button appears; tapping it downloads questions for offline play.

Test Description: Tap the download button. Verify progress indicator and success message.
Expected Result: Button shows 'Downloading...' with a spinner, then shows 'Successfully downloaded 50 questions for offline use!'

Test Description: After downloading, verify the 'Play Offline' card appears.
Expected Result: A third mode card 'Play Offline' is visible below the timed mode card.

Test Description: Tap 'Play Offline'. Verify you enter Quiz Play in offline mode.
Expected Result: QuizPlayScreen opens in offline mode; you can answer locally saved questions without internet.

Test Description: Tap 'Update Offline Questions' (after initial download). Verify it re-downloads.
Expected Result: The button text changes to 'Update Offline Questions (50 Saved)'; tapping re-downloads.

Test Description: Start a quiz (any category, any mode). Verify 10 questions are loaded and displayed one at a time.
Expected Result: You are presented with a question, 4 options, and progress dots showing 10 total questions.

Test Description: Verify the question text is displayed clearly with proper formatting.
Expected Result: Question text is readable with good font size and color contrast against the background.

Test Description: Verify the 4 answer options are displayed as tappable cards.
Expected Result: Four option buttons are shown in a vertical list or grid format; each is tappable.

Test Description: Tap an answer option (correct). Verify green highlight and confetti effect.
Expected Result: The selected option highlights green; confetti particles burst from the top of the screen; a score popup shows the points earned.

Test Description: Tap an answer option (incorrect). Verify red highlight and explanation box.
Expected Result: The selected option highlights red; the correct answer is indicated; an explanation box appears below the question.

Test Description: Verify that after answering, you cannot tap other options (answers are locked).
Expected Result: After selecting an option, all other options become non-tappable.

Test Description: Tap 'Next Question' after answering. Verify progression to the next question with a slide animation.
Expected Result: The next question slides in; the progress dots update to show your current position.

Test Description: Verify the progress dots at the top update as you answer questions (green for correct, red for incorrect).
Expected Result: Progress dots show green for correct answers, red for incorrect, reflecting your performance so far.

Test Description: Complete all 10 questions. Verify you reach the Results screen.
Expected Result: After the 10th question, the Results screen appears showing your score, accuracy, and a motivational quote.

Test Description: On the Results screen, verify score, correct answers, total questions, and percentage are displayed.
Expected Result: Score (XP earned), X correct out of 10, and a percentage are clearly shown.

Test Description: Verify a motivational quote is shown on the Results screen.
Expected Result: A random motivational quote with author is displayed at the bottom of the results.

Test Description: Tap the back button on the Results screen. Verify you return to the Challenge Select screen.
Expected Result: Pressing back takes you back to the Challenge Select screen for the same category.

Test Description: Start a Timed Challenge. Verify the 15-second timer counts down for each question.
Expected Result: A circular timer appears next to the progress dots, counting down from 15 seconds.

Test Description: Let the timer expire without answering. Verify the question is marked as incorrect and a penalty is applied (if level >= 2).
Expected Result: The question auto-advances as incorrect; a penalty deduction message may appear.

Test Description: Answer quickly with a streak of correct answers. Verify the streak badge appears when >= 2 consecutive correct.
Expected Result: A streak badge/fire icon appears when you get 2+ correct answers in a row in timed mode.

Test Description: In Normal Challenge, deliberately get 2+ consecutive incorrect answers. Verify the AI chat FAB button appears.
Expected Result: A floating AI chat button appears after 2 consecutive wrong answers (in untimed mode only).

Test Description: Tap the AI chat FAB button. Verify the AI chat sheet opens with context about your incorrect answers.
Expected Result: A bottom sheet opens showing an AI chat interface with your category and incorrect questions context.

Test Description: Type a question in the AI chat input and send. Verify you receive an AI response.
Expected Result: The AI responds with an explanation or answer relevant to your quiz category and the incorrect questions.

Test Description: As a logged-in user, verify shield, skip, and pause timer indicators are shown on the quiz screen.
Expected Result: Small icon indicators for shield, skip, and pause timer are visible near the top of the quiz screen (only for online modes).

Test Description: Tap the shield button. Verify it toggles on/off (highlighted when active).
Expected Result: The shield icon lights up/animates; tapping again deactivates it.

Test Description: With shield active, answer a question incorrectly. Verify no penalty is deducted but a shield is consumed.
Expected Result: Score does not decrease; shield count decreases by 1; shield deactivates.

Test Description: Tap the skip button. Verify the current question is skipped and you advance without penalty.
Expected Result: The current question is skipped; you move to the next question; skip count decreases by 1.

Test Description: In Timed mode, tap the pause timer button. Verify the timer freezes.
Expected Result: The timer stops counting down; the pause indicator shows the timer is frozen.

Test Description: Try to use a shield/skip/pause when you have 0 remaining. Verify a snackbar error message appears.
Expected Result: A red snackbar appears: 'No shields/skips/pause timers remaining!'

Test Description: Start an Offline Challenge. Verify questions are loaded from local storage.
Expected Result: You can play through all 10 questions without any internet connection.

Test Description: In offline mode, verify that power-up indicators are NOT shown (shield/skip/pause).
Expected Result: No shield, skip, or pause timer indicators appear on the offline quiz screen.

Test Description: Complete an offline quiz. Verify results are saved locally as guest progress.
Expected Result: Results screen appears; progress is saved to local storage (SharedPreferences).

Test Description: While in a quiz, tap the red X (close) button in the AppBar. Verify the quit confirmation dialog.
Expected Result: A dialog asks: 'Quit Challenge/Session?' with warning about point loss.

Test Description: Confirm quitting. Verify you return to the Challenge Select screen and penalty is applied if eligible.
Expected Result: You exit the quiz; if level >= 2, a penalty of 10 (normal) or 15 (timed) points is deducted.

Test Description: Verify that quitting as a Rookie (level 1 or below) does NOT deduct any points.
Expected Result: Confirmation dialog says 'You will not lose any points'; no deduction occurs on quit.

Test Description: Complete a quiz with high performance (90%+ accuracy). Verify you may unlock badges.
Expected Result: If badge criteria are met, badge celebration dialogs appear after quiz completion.

Test Description: Verify badge celebration dialog shows the newly unlocked badge name and design.
Expected Result: A dialog pops up showing the badge icon, name, and description with celebratory animation.

Test Description: Verify level-up screen appears after quiz if you leveled up.
Expected Result: If your total score crosses a level threshold, the QuizLevelUpScreen shows your old and new levels with animation.

Test Description: Verify multiple badges unlocked in one session show sequentially.
Expected Result: Badges appear one by one with staggered timing and toast notifications.

Test Description: Navigate to the Shop tab (bottom nav). Verify the shop header and coin balance are displayed.
Expected Result: Shop title with store icon is shown; your 'Quiz Coins' balance from Firestore is displayed live.

Test Description: Verify shop items are listed: Shield, Skip Question, Pause Timer. Each shows name, description, price, and owned count.
Expected Result: At least 3 items are displayed with their details; owned count shows X / 3.

Test Description: Tap 'BUY' on an item you can afford. Verify purchase success snackbar and updated coin balance.
Expected Result: Snackbar: '✅ Purchased [item name]!'; coin balance and item count update in real-time.

Test Description: Tap 'BUY' on an item you cannot afford. Verify button is disabled.
Expected Result: The buy button is disabled (greyed out) when you don't have enough coins.

Test Description: Try to buy an item when you already own 3 of that item. Verify 'MAXED' label and button is hidden.
Expected Result: The item shows 'MAXED' badge; buy button is replaced; attempting to purchase shows error: 'Not enough coins or at max capacity (3)!'

Test Description: Tap the 'Earn more' button next to coin balance. Verify info dialog appears.
Expected Result: Dialog: 'You can earn more coins by competing in quiz sessions'

Test Description: Verify the 'You can hold a maximum of 3 of each item' info card is displayed at bottom.
Expected Result: Info card with max capacity note is visible below shop items.

Test Description: As a guest user, verify the shop shows 'Sign in to access the shop' message.
Expected Result: The shop displays a centered message instead of items; no coins or purchases available.

Test Description: Navigate to the Rankings tab (bottom nav). Verify the rankings header and sort toggle are shown.
Expected Result: 'Rankings' title, subtitle, and sort direction toggle icon are displayed.

Test Description: Verify category filter chips are shown: All, Computer Architecture, Software Engineering, Computer Networking.
Expected Result: 4 filter chips are horizontally scrollable below the header.

Test Description: Tap a specific category filter (e.g. 'Computer Architecture'). Verify rankings are filtered by that category's points.
Expected Result: The ranking list updates to sort by category-specific points instead of total XP.

Test Description: Toggle the sort direction. Verify rankings reverse order.
Expected Result: Rankings switch between descending (high to low) and ascending (low to high) order.

Test Description: Verify each ranking card shows: rank number/trophy, avatar, display name, level badge, selected badges, XP, and category points.
Expected Result: Each card has complete user info with visual elements.

Test Description: Verify top 3 users show gold, silver, and bronze trophy icons.
Expected Result: Positions 1-3 display gold, silver, and bronze trophy icons respectively.

Test Description: If no rankings exist, verify empty state message is shown.
Expected Result: Message: 'No rankings yet. Start playing to get listed!'

Test Description: Navigate to the Profile tab (bottom nav). Verify header shows 'Profile' and action buttons (settings, bug report, logout).
Expected Result: Profile title is shown; for logged-in users: bug report, settings, and logout icons appear in the top-right.

Test Description: Verify the profile card shows: display name, email, avatar with glowing ring, level badge, XP bar with % to next level.
Expected Result: Profile card contains all user info with the animated XP progress bar.

Test Description: Verify the streak counter is shown if streak > 0.
Expected Result: Streak with fire icon and count is displayed with a pulsing animation.

Test Description: Verify selected badges are displayed below the streak (max 3).
Expected Result: Selected badges appear as small colored tags with names beneath the streak.

Test Description: Verify 'Earned Badges' section shows the count (unlocked/total) and a grid of 4 badge cards.
Expected Result: Progress shown as 'X of Y Unlocked'; 4 badges are displayed in a 2x2 grid; locked badges appear greyed out.

Test Description: Tap 'See all' next to badges. Verify you navigate to the full Badges & Achievements screen.
Expected Result: EarnedBadgesScreen opens with all badges in a scrollable grid and progress card.

Test Description: Verify the Ranking History section is shown for logged-in users.
Expected Result: A list of past rank history entries is shown with rank letter, percentage, category, and date.

Test Description: If no rank history exists, verify empty state message.
Expected Result: Message: 'No rank history yet' with subtitle 'Complete a quiz to see your rank!'

Test Description: As a guest user, verify a 'Log In / Sign Up' button is shown instead of action icons.
Expected Result: A full-width login button appears; settings, bug report, and logout icons are hidden.

Test Description: Tap the logout icon. Verify confirmation dialog appears.
Expected Result: Dialog: 'Are you sure you want to log out?' with Cancel and Log Out options.

Test Description: Confirm logout. Verify you are logged out and the profile refreshes to guest state.
Expected Result: After logout, profile shows guest state with login button.

Test Description: On the Badges & Achievements screen, tap an unlocked badge. Verify it toggles selection (on/off).
Expected Result: Tapping selects the badge (checkmark appears); tapping again deselects it.

Test Description: Verify you can select a maximum of 3 badges. Try selecting a 4th.
Expected Result: After selecting 3, attempting to select another shows snackbar: 'You can select a maximum of 3 badges to display in rankings.'

Test Description: Verify selected badges persist after navigating away and back.
Expected Result: Selected badges state is saved to Firestore and restored when re-entering the screen.

Test Description: Tap the 'Export Card' button on an unlocked badge. Verify the download card modal opens.
Expected Result: A dialog opens showing the badge card design with 'Save Card' and 'Close' buttons.

Test Description: Tap 'Save Card' in the export modal. Verify the badge PNG is saved to device storage.
Expected Result: The badge card is saved as a PNG image; a success snackbar shows the file path.

Test Description: Verify locked badges show a lock icon and are greyed out.
Expected Result: Locked badges display a lock icon instead of the badge icon, with reduced opacity.

Test Description: Verify the progress card shows total unlocked count and a progress bar.
Expected Result: Card displays 'X of Y Unlocked' with a linear progress bar showing completion percentage.

Test Description: Navigate to Settings from Profile. Verify the settings screen opens with header and back button.
Expected Result: Settings screen shows 'Settings' title with a working back button.

Test Description: Verify the avatar section is displayed with current avatar and 'Customize Avatar' button.
Expected Result: Current avatar shown in a glowing ring; 'Customize Avatar' button is visible beneath it.

Test Description: Tap 'Customize Avatar'. Verify Avatar Customizer dialog opens.
Expected Result: AvatarCustomizerDialog appears with avatar options/settings.

Test Description: Customize the avatar and save. Verify success snackbar.
Expected Result: Snackbar: 'Avatar saved successfully!'; avatar updates across the app.

Test Description: In the 'Update Account Info' section, change your display name and tap 'Save Changes'.
Expected Result: Success banner: 'Account information updated successfully!'; name updates across the app.

Test Description: In the 'Danger Zone', tap 'Delete Account'. Verify the first confirmation dialog appears.
Expected Result: First dialog: 'Delete Account?' warning about irreversible data loss, with Cancel and Delete options.

Test Description: Tap 'Delete Permanently'. Verify the password reauthentication dialog appears.
Expected Result: Second dialog requests password confirmation with a text field.

Test Description: Enter the correct password and tap 'Delete Permanently'. Verify account deletion and return to guest state.
Expected Result: Account is deleted; you are returned to the main navigation as a guest user.

Test Description: During deletion, enter an incorrect password. Verify error message.
Expected Result: Error: 'Incorrect password. Please try again.'

Test Description: Navigate to Bug Report from Profile. Verify the screen opens with header, back button, and form.
Expected Result: Bug Report screen shows title, description, and the bug report form.

Test Description: Verify your email and app version are auto-filled as read-only fields.
Expected Result: Email shows your logged-in email or 'Not signed in'; App Version shows '1.1.0+3'.

Test Description: Submit the bug report form with an empty description. Verify validation.
Expected Result: Snackbar error: 'Please describe the bug.'

Test Description: Fill in both 'Bug Description' and 'Expected Behavior' fields, then submit. Verify success.
Expected Result: Success snackbar: 'Bug report submitted successfully! Thank you.'; screen pops back.

Test Description: Verify max character limits on text fields (2000 for description, 1000 for expected behavior).
Expected Result: Character counters are shown; input is limited to the specified max lengths.

Test Description: Verify the Analytics screen is accessible (e.g., from a navigation link or route).
Expected Result: Analytics screen opens with a title and content sections.

Test Description: Verify the accuracy breakdown pie chart shows correct vs incorrect answers.
Expected Result: Pie chart displays green (correct) and red (incorrect) sections with percentage labels.

Test Description: Verify the points by subject bar chart shows points for Computer Architecture, Computer Networking, and Software Engineering.
Expected Result: Bar chart with 3 bars (Arch, Net, Soft Eng) shows subject-specific point totals.

Test Description: Verify the subject statistics cards show per-subject: answered, correct, and wrong counts.
Expected Result: Three cards (one per subject) display Answered, Correct, and Wrong statistics with color-coded numbers.

Test Description: If no quiz data exists, verify empty state message.
Expected Result: Message: 'Play some quizzes to generate analytics!'

Test Description: As a guest user, verify the analytics screen shows 'Please log in to view analytics.'
Expected Result: A centered message prompts the user to log in.

Test Description: Verify the bottom navigation bar is displayed on all main tabs.
Expected Result: A styled bottom nav bar with 4 tabs (Home, Rankings, Shop, Profile) is visible.

Test Description: Tap each tab (Home, Rankings, Shop, Profile). Verify the correct screen loads and tab highlights.
Expected Result: Each tap navigates to the corresponding screen; the active tab is highlighted.

Test Description: Verify the Profile tab icon shows the user's avatar (SVG) when logged in.
Expected Result: The 4th tab shows the user's avatar image instead of a generic person icon.

Test Description: Verify the bottom nav bar is styled with rounded corners and correct colors.
Expected Result: Nav bar has dark blue background, rounded corners, white inactive icons, and blue active highlight.

Test Description: Navigate between screens that use ParticleBackground. Verify animated particles float across the screen.
Expected Result: Subtle animated particles (dots or shapes) drift across the background on screens like Home, Rankings, Shop, Profile, and Quiz Play.

Test Description: As a guest, verify your progress is saved locally when completing an offline quiz.
Expected Result: Guest progress (score, correct answers) is stored in SharedPreferences/LocalProgressService.

Test Description: As a guest, verify the Profile page shows your guest username, zero stats, and login prompt.
Expected Result: Profile shows guest username, 0 stats, and 'Log In / Sign Up' button.

Test Description: As a guest, verify the Shop page shows 'Sign in to access the shop' message.
Expected Result: Shop shows sign-in prompt instead of items.

Test Description: As a guest, verify the Rankings page still loads and shows other users' rankings.
Expected Result: Rankings page loads normally (read-only view of leaderboard).

Test Description: Play a quiz as a low-level user. Verify the session XP cannot exceed 30% of XP needed for the next level.
Expected Result: The session score shown on results is capped; your total score increase respects the cap.

Test Description: Play a quiz as a Rookie (below Amateur). Verify a 15 XP bonus is applied.
Expected Result: Rookie users get an additional 15 XP bonus on top of the session score (still within the cap).

Test Description: Complete a quiz with correct answers. Verify coins are earned based on streak segments and mode (timed/normal).
Expected Result: CoinService.totalCoinsWithBreaks calculates coins; the coins earned are shown on the results screen and added to Firestore.

Test Description: Verify coins are stored in Firestore under 'quizCoins' field for the user.
Expected Result: User's Firestore document shows updated quizCoins balance after quiz completion.
